description_long: This object is a military medal featuring a cross-shaped pendant suspended from a vertically striped ribbon. The cross is gold-toned with black edges and has a circular center medallion, which displays an emblem and inscriptions. The ribbon is primarily light blue with a single dark stripe running down its length, and it is folded in a traditional manner for medals. On one side of the cross, the inscription 'MILITARI VIRTUTI' is visible, encircling a white eagle motif. The reverse side of the cross displays ornate script initials and a central design. The medal's metallic surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, while the ribbon has a matte, fabric texture.
description: A gold-toned cross medal with a striped blue ribbon, featuring inscriptions and an eagle emblem at its center. The medal combines smooth metal with a matte fabric ribbon.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross medal with ornate script initials and a central design, attached to a folded striped ribbon.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the cross and the layered, folded structure of the ribbon.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inscription 'MILITARI VIRTUTI' and a white eagle emblem on the cross, with the ribbon's stripes clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thinness of the medal and the ribbon's folded layers.
